news.title: Chris Brace named Graduate School Associate Dean
news.summary_en: Chris Brace, professor of radiology and biomedical engineering, will join the Graduate School as associate dean starting in June.

news.title: PhD student Burke receives dissertation fellowship to map a crafting movement
news.summary_en: PhD student Danielle Burke has received a fellowship to help her create a digital map of craftspeople from the Handicraft Movement and invite the people who still have or use those handiworks today to contribute to the site.
